title: Preserving Safe Communities by Ending Swatting Act of 2025
short_title: Preserving Safe Communities by Ending Swatting Act of 2025
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Preserving Safe Communities by Ending Swatting Act of 2025 This bill makes it a crime to intentionally convey false or misleading information in circumstances where the information may reasonably be expected to cause an emergency response and the information indicates the occurrence of criminal conduct or a threat to health or safety (commonly referred to as swatting ).
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
